text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning! Time to get down to business as
the class representative today as well!

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Class Representative! You don't need to push
yourself all the time! You should put your feet up
sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Kind Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Juggling responsibilities and racing takes a toll on
your body. Let your classmates help with your
class representative duties!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your feelings of admiration for the class
representative have been conveyed! I will not let
them fall on deaf ears. Today, I'll act as an
"ordinary student."

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, everyone! It's about time we
started the class.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, one moment please! As the class
representative, it's my duty to clear the
blackboard first...

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! You're an ordinary student today! I'm
on duty, so I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Y-you're right... I'm just a student right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the class representative, the well-intentioned
actions of her classmates are an unimaginable
hardship.
